2604.23325.title: EAD-Net: Emotion-Aware Talking Head Generation with Spatial Refinement and Temporal Coherence
2604.23325.paper_summary: Emotionally talking head video generation aims to generate expressive portrait videos with accurate lip synchronization and emotional facial expressions. Current methods rely on simple emotional labels, leading to insufficient semantic information. While introducing high-level semantics enhances expressiveness, it easily causes lip-sync degradation. Furthermore, mainstream generation methods struggle to balance computational efficiency and global motion awareness in long videos and suffer from poor temporal coherence. Therefore, we propose an \textbf{E}motion-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{D}iffusion model-based \textbf{Net}work, called \textbf{EAD-Net}. We introduce SyncNet supervision and Temporal Representation Alignment (TREPA) to mitigate lip-sync degradation caused by multi-modal fusion. To model complex spatio-temporal dependencies in long video sequences, we propose a Spatio-Temporal Directional Attention (STDA) mechanism that captures global motion patterns through strip attention. Additionally, we design a Temporal Frame graph Reasoning Module (TFRM) to explicitly model temporal coherence between video frames through graph structure learning. To enhance emotional semantic control, a large language model is employed to extract textual descriptions from real videos, serving as high-level semantic guidance. Experiments on the HDTF and MEAD datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods in terms of lip-sync accuracy, temporal consistency, and emotional accuracy.
2604.23325.paper_summary_zh: 情感對話頭影片生成旨在生成具有準確嘴唇同步和情感面部表情的表現力肖像影片。當前的方法依賴於簡單的情感標籤，導致語義信息不足。雖然引入高級語義可以增強表現力，但也容易導致嘴唇同步的退化。此外，主流生成方法在長影片中難以平衡計算效率和全局運動感知，並且存在時間一致性差的問題。因此，我們提出了一種基於\textbf{E}motion-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{D}iffusion模型的\textbf{Net}work，稱為\textbf{EAD-Net}。我們引入SyncNet監督和時間表示對齊（TREPA）來減輕由多模態融合引起的嘴唇同步退化。為了建模長影片序列中的複雜時空依賴，我們提出了一種時空方向注意力（STDA）機制，通過條帶注意力捕捉全局運動模式。此外，我們設計了一個時間幀圖推理模塊（TFRM），通過圖結構學習明確建模影片幀之間的時間一致性。為了增強情感語義控制，我們使用大型語言模型從真實影片中提取文本描述，作為高級語義指導。對於HDTF和MEAD數據集的實驗表明，我們的方法在嘴唇同步準確性、時間一致性和情感準確性方面優於現有方法。
2604.23325.author: Yahui Li et.al.
2604.23325.authors: Yahui Li, Yinfeng Yu, Liejun Wang, Shengjie Shen
